on"},{"stateMutability":"payable","type":"receive"}],"devdoc":{"details":"Inherit from this contract, then expose public wrappers protected by your      own access control (e.g. onlyOwner). Example:      function registerBasename(string memory name, uint256 duration)          external payable onlyOwner      {          _registerBasename(name, duration);          _setForwardResolution(name);   // sets name.base.eth \u2192 address(this)      }      After registration both directions are set:        address(this) \u2192 name.base.eth   (reverse \u2014 set during registration)        name.base.eth \u2192 address(this)   (forward \u2014 set by _setForwardResolution)      Rescue: if a contract already owns a name but the forward record is wrong,      call _setForwardResolution(name) at any time to correct it.","kind":"dev","methods":{},"stateVariables":{"_useCustomAddresses":{"details":"Set to true when testnet addresses are provided in the constructor."}},"title":"BasenameRegistrar","version":1},"userdoc":{"events":{"BasenameRegistered(string,address,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when a basename is successfully registered."},"ForwardResolutionSet(string,address)":{"notice":"Emitted when the forward addr record is set on the resolver."},"PrimaryBasenameSet(string,address)":{"notice":"Emitted when the primary (reverse) name is set or updated."}},"kind":"user","methods":{"L2_RESOLVER()":{"notice":"L2Resolver on Base mainnet."},"MIN_REGISTRATION_DURATION()":{"notice":"Minimum registration duration (365 days)."},"REGISTRAR_CONTROLLER()":{"notice":"UpgradeableRegistrarController proxy \u2014 the active registration         contract on Base mainnet (0x4cCb... is deprecated and no longer         approved by BaseRegistrar)."},"REVERSE_REGISTRAR()":{"notice":"ReverseRegistrar on Base mainnet."},"constructor":{"notice":"Pass (address(0), address(0), address(0)) for Base mainnet.         Pass actual addresses to override for testnets."},"getBasenamePrice(string,uint256)":{"notice":"Returns the total cost in wei to register a name for a given duration."}},"notice":"Abstract contract that enables any smart contract to register and manage         its own Basename (name.base.eth) on REGISTRAR_CONTROLLER().notice: UpgradeableRegistrarController proxy — the active registration         contract on Base mainnet (0x4cCb... is deprecated and no longer         approved by BaseRegistrar).

constructor.notice: Pass (address(0), address(0), address(0)) for Base mainnet.         Pass actual addresses to override for testnets.

getBasenamePrice(string,uint256).notice: Returns the total cost in wei to register a name for a given duration.
